title: cassinia aculeata
intro: Cassinia aculeata, also known as prickly cassinia, is a native Australian shrub belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, derived from its leaves and essential oils. The health benefits of Cassinia aculeata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cassinia aculeata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
